CRITICAL.name: data_freshness_breach
CRITICAL.condition: Pipeline has not run in more than 24 hours
CRITICAL.message: The data pipeline has not run in over 24 hours, leading to stale data.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Immediately investigate and restart the pipeline.

CRITICAL.name: quality_threshold_breach
CRITICAL.message: Data quality has fallen below the 99.9% threshold, risking incorrect financial insights.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Investigate and resolve data quality issues immediately.

CRITICAL.name: row_count_out_of_bounds
CRITICAL.condition: Row count is outside the 17-25 range
CRITICAL.message: The row count is outside the expected range of 17-25, indicating potential data completeness issues.
CRITICAL.recommended_action: Check for data completeness and integrity issues.

WARNING.name: runtime_approaching_limit
WARNING.condition: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit
WARNING.message: Pipeline runtime is approaching the 120-minute limit, which may delay the dashboard update.
WARNING.recommended_action: Monitor the pipeline and optimize if necessary to meet the runtime SLO.

WARNING.name: quality_slightly_below_threshold
WARNING.condition: Data quality percentage is slightly below 99.9%
WARNING.message: Data quality is slightly below the 99.9% threshold, which may lead to minor financial inaccuracies.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate and address any data quality issues to prevent further decline.

WARNING.name: merchant_failure_spike
WARNING.condition: One merchant's failure rate spikes above 30%
WARNING.message: A merchant's failure rate has spiked above 30%, indicating potential issues with data processing for that merchant.
WARNING.recommended_action: Investigate the cause of the spike and resolve the issue for the affected merchant.

INFO.name: new_payment_method
INFO.condition: A new payment method is detected in the data
INFO.message: A new payment method has been detected in the data.
INFO.recommended_action: Verify the new payment method and update the system if necessary.

INFO.name: row_count_near_bounds
INFO.condition: Daily row count is near the 17-25 range bounds
INFO.message: The daily row count is near the bounds of the 17-25 range.
INFO.recommended_action: Monitor the row count to ensure it remains within the expected range.
